brand.name: Strategic Minds Advisory
brand.positioning: AI-powered advisory and automation studio for founders, operators, and growing businesses that need business systems built, automated, and governed.
brand.promise: Turn ideas into automated, AI-powered business systems without exposing clients to unsafe automation, live billing, or ungated production actions.
audience: operators who need AI automation with governance

voice.headlineStyle: direct outcome-led statements with concrete business language
copyRules: Use AI and automation language, but keep governance and approval gates visible.
Use strong claims only when they are framed as capabilities, not guaranteed financial outcomes.
Prefer concise sections, scannable bullets, and action-oriented CTAs.

paletteRules: Use ink/white/mist as the dominant system palette.
Use electric blue and cyan as precision accents, not full-page gradients.
Avoid purple-heavy, beige, brown/orange, and one-hue themes.

rules: hero type only for true hero
dense dashboard text should stay compact

layout.sectionStyle: full-width bands or constrained unframed layouts
layout.cardUse: cards only for repeated items, modals, or framed tools
layout.navigation: quiet top navigation with clear CTA

interfaceRules.firstViewport: The first screen must communicate Strategic Minds Advisory and show the business-system/automation subject clearly.

routeFamilies.admin: restrained control plane for approvals, workflows, receipts, and releases
